title: Verilator_coverage toggle coverage score miscalculates multiple points on one line

features.name: packed_struct_input_port_multiple_fields
features.description: Code should include a packed struct type with multiple fields declared as an input port on a single line
features.snippet: struct packed { logic [31:0] a; logic [15:0] b; logic [7:0] c; } s; input s port;
